code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut partial = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut neg = false
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut has_digit = false
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if i >= n
          done = true
        else
          mut c = 0
          match string.byte_at(input, i)
          when Some(v)
            c = v
          when None
            c = 0
          end
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            has_digit = true
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      if has_digit
        if neg
          num = -num
        end
        if num < 0
          stop = true
        else
          partial = partial + num
        end
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    end
  end
  println("partial=#{partial}")
end
